---
title: "Research Introduction: Business Analytics, Data Science, and Machine Learning Trends"
author: "Team 1"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    bibliography: references.bib
    csl: econometrica.csl
    toc: true
---

Below is the rationale statement for our research.

## 📄 Rationale Statement

{#pdf-container}
<embed src="hand_in_via_pdf/Group_1_rationale_statement.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" type="application/pdf">

---

[Download the PDF](hand_in_via_pdf/Group_1_rationale_statement.pdf)
